data.title: Trump To Hold Press Conference On Reciprocal Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will hold a press conference on reciprocal tariffs today at 1 PM, which corresponds to 2 AM tomorrow in Beijing time (UTC+8).

data.title: BNB funding rates on Binance and OKX hit -0.0221% and -0.02019% respectively
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the market, the current funding rates of BNB on Binance and OKX have reached -0.0221% and -0.02019% respectively.
It is reported that long positions and short positions usually have to exchange funding rates at the next funding rate time point. If the rate is positive, the long position pays the short position. If the rate is negative, the short position pays the long position.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 730 USDT with a 14.43% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 13:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 730 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 730.640015 USDT, with a narrowed 14.43% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. Short-Term Interest Rate Futures Remain Steady After PPI Release
data.description: According to PANews, following the release of the Producer Price Index (PPI), U.S. short-term interest rate futures showed little change. The market continues to widely anticipate that the Federal Reserve will maintain its policy rate unchanged until September.

data.title: PPI exceeded expectations, but the market still expects the Fed to remain on hold until September
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After the release of PPI, US short-term interest rate futures did not change much, and the market still generally expects the Federal Reserve to keep the policy interest rate unchanged until September. (Jinshi)

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Rises to 43 Marking a 3 Point Increase
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 43, reflecting an increase of 3 points compared to the previous day. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization, to determine whether the market is in an altcoin season or remains Bitcoin-dominated.Over the past 90 days, 43 of these altcoins have outperformed Bitcoin in terms of price growth, signalling a [weakening/strengthening] altcoin trend.The CMC Altcoin Season Index is a key crypto market indicator used to determine whether the current cryptocurrency market is in an altcoin-dominated season. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the past 90 days

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims Show Slight Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial unemployment claims in the United States for the week ending February 8 was reported at 213,000, slightly below the expected 215,000. The previous week's figure was revised from 219,000 to 220,000. The four-week moving average of initial claims was 216,000, adjusted from the prior 216,750 to 217,000. Additionally, for the week ending February 1, continuing unemployment claims were recorded at 1.85 million, lower than the anticipated 1.88 million and down from the previous 1.886 million.

data.title: BNB breaks through 730 USDT, up 12.04% in 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that BNB has broken through 730 USDT and is currently trading at 728.7 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 12.04%.

data.title: US media: Apple continues to work with Baidu to develop AI features for iPhone in China to reduce risks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to two people familiar with the situation, although Apple has reached a cooperation with its new partner Alibaba Group, it is still working with Baidu to develop artificial intelligence features for Chinese iPhone users. Specifically, Baidu has been developing an artificial intelligence search function that can process pictures and text, and upgrading the Chinese version of Siri voice assistant. These features are part of the feature suite of "Apple Intelligence". Apple's cooperation with Baidu and Alibaba shows that the company reduces risks by signing non-exclusive agreements with multiple AI partners. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase will list Story (IP)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase announced that it will add support for Story (IP) on the Story Protocol network. Please do not send this asset through other networks, otherwise funds may be lost. Recharge is currently open. If liquidity conditions are met, IP-USD transactions will start later today.
